projectDescription: A high-quality, open-source voice conversion tool built on RVC (Retrieval-Based Voice Conversion) with a Gradio UI, CLI, real-time conversion, TTS pipeline, model training, and plugin support.
keyFeatures: High-quality voice conversion using Retrieval-Based Voice Conversion (RVC)
Gradio web UI with tabbed interface (Inference, Training, TTS, Real-time, Voice Blender)
CLI interface via core.py for scriptable, headless operations
Real-time voice conversion with low-latency audio callbacks
Text-to-speech pipeline using Edge TTS combined with RVC voice conversion
Model training pipeline: preprocess → extract features → train → generate index
Voice Blender for fusing two RVC models at a configurable ratio
Post-processing effects: reverb, chorus, distortion, compressor, delay, bitcrush, limiter, gain, pitch shift, clipping
Multiple F0 pitch extraction algorithms: rmvpe, crepe, crepe-tiny, fcpe, hybrid modes
Multiple speaker embedder models: contentvec, spin, spin-v2, multilingual HuBERT variants, custom
Plugin system for extending functionality via zip-installable plugins
Docker and docker-compose support for containerized deployment
Overtraining detector to prevent overfitting during model training
Support for multiple vocoder options including HiFi-GAN
publicApiSurface: run_infer_script(pitch, index_rate, volume_envelope, protect, f0_method, input_path, output_path, pth_path, index_path, ...)
run_batch_infer_script(pitch, index_rate, volume_envelope, protect, f0_method, input_folder, output_folder, pth_path, index_path, ...)
run_tts_script(tts_file, tts_text, tts_voice, tts_rate, pitch, index_rate, ..., pth_path, index_path, ...)
run_preprocess_script(model_name, dataset_path, sample_rate, cpu_cores, cut_preprocess, process_effects, noise_reduction, ...)
run_extract_script(model_name, f0_method, cpu_cores, gpu, sample_rate, embedder_model, ...)
run_train_script(model_name, save_every_epoch, save_only_latest, total_epoch, sample_rate, batch_size, gpu, ...)
